2603.28737.title: ParaSpeechCLAP: A Dual-Encoder Speech-Text Model for Rich Stylistic Language-Audio Pretraining
2603.28737.paper_summary: We introduce ParaSpeechCLAP, a dual-encoder contrastive model that maps speech and text style captions into a common embedding space, supporting a wide range of intrinsic (speaker-level) and situational (utterance-level) descriptors (such as pitch, texture and emotion) far beyond the narrow set handled by existing models. We train specialized ParaSpeechCLAP-Intrinsic and ParaSpeechCLAP-Situational models alongside a unified ParaSpeechCLAP-Combined model, finding that specialization yields stronger performance on individual style dimensions while the unified model excels on compositional evaluation. We further show that ParaSpeechCLAP-Intrinsic benefits from an additional classification loss and class-balanced training. We demonstrate our models' performance on style caption retrieval, speech attribute classification and as an inference-time reward model that improves style-prompted TTS without additional training. ParaSpeechCLAP outperforms baselines on most metrics across all three applications. Our models and code are released at https://github.com/ajd12342/paraspeechclap .
2603.28737.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹了 ParaSpeechCLAP，一種雙編碼器對比模型，將語音和文本風格標題映射到共同的嵌入空間，支持廣泛的內在（說話者級別）和情境（發話級別）描述符（例如音調、質感和情感），遠超現有模型處理的狹窄範疇。我們訓練了專門的 ParaSpeechCLAP-Intrinsic 和 ParaSpeechCLAP-Situational 模型，並與統一的 ParaSpeechCLAP-Combined 模型一起進行，發現專業化在個別風格維度上能夠產生更強的性能，而統一模型在組合評估上表現優異。我們進一步顯示，ParaSpeechCLAP-Intrinsic 受益於額外的分類損失和類別平衡訓練。我們展示了我們模型在風格標題檢索、語音屬性分類以及作為推理時獎勵模型的性能，該模型在不進行額外訓練的情況下改善了風格提示的 TTS。ParaSpeechCLAP 在所有三個應用的多數指標上超越了基準。我們的模型和代碼已在 https://github.com/ajd12342/paraspeechclap 上發布。
2603.28737.author: Anuj Diwan et.al.
2603.28737.authors: Anuj Diwan, Eunsol Choi, David Harwath
